---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the pain point clearly.
(e.g. "When working on a TypeScript project, `get_signature` returns an error instead of useful output...")

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this? What are the trade-offs?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or related issues that might help explain the idea.

## Are you willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this and open a PR
- [ ] I can help with testing / feedback
- [ ] No, just suggesting
